description: Happy path: clear DIY project idea returns high confidence with correct pillar

input.idea: chalk paint vintage nightstand makeover with dark moody finish

expect.rationale: non-empty one-line string explaining the classification

prohibit: pillar value outside the five allowed pillars
confidence low for a clearly DIY makeover project

description: Minimal input: short ambiguous idea returns medium confidence with secondary pillar named in rationale

expect.rationale: non-empty string; if confidence is medium, rationale names the secondary pillar

prohibit: pillar value outside the five allowed pillars
empty rationale when confidence is medium
fabricated performance data or audience metrics in rationale

description: Edge case: idea spans two pillars equally, returns primary with medium confidence and names secondary in rationale

input.idea: thrifted Christmas mantel styling with DIY garland

expect.pillar: seasonal and holiday or DIY and room makeovers (either valid as primary)
expect.rationale: names the secondary pillar that was not chosen as primary

prohibit: confidence high for a clearly dual-pillar idea
rationale that omits the secondary pillar when confidence is medium
pillar value outside the five allowed pillars
